title: I have developed AI to automate my SMC analyses (Order Blocks, BOS) - Need your trader opinions!
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Hi community!



As a trader, I used to spend a lot of time scanning charts to find clean Order Blocks and validate my market structures. To make my life easier, I coded a tool (Hercul Market) that uses AI to directly analyze screenshots and plot high probability zones.



In the shared image, you can see how AI identified the current supply zone. The goal is not to replace our analysis, but to get instant confirmation before making a trade to avoid fatigue-related errors.



I am in the beta testing phase and would love to hear feedback from real SMC traders:

Do the areas seem relevant to you?

What features are you missing in your current tools?

Thank you in advance for your constructive feedback! 📊🤖"

Here is the trade that advised me :

comments.author: maximusa26
comments.body: Which Ai model do you using ?
